query: SELECT id, quotationNumber, subtotal, transportCost, discountPercent, discountAmount, total FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%Orlando%' OR clientId IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Orlando%') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
